mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, client_id, capability_id, version_strategy, fixed_version, field_policy, status, expires_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_capability_grant WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_capability_grant SET status = 'REVOKED', del_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
